expectations.text: behavioral_check: Uses the correct field name `ripple_param_name` (singular), not `ripple_params_name`
behavioral_check: Scopes the cleanup to RippleTimesV1 rows with the affected `ripple_param_name`, not all RippleTimesV1 rows
expectations.evidence: Restriction `RippleTimesV1 & {"ripple_param_name": "Kay_ripple_detection_v2"}` is scoped to the corrupted name.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Explicitly lists what is unaffected — LFP, LFPBand, RippleLFPSelection, position, decoding branches not downstream of the affected ripple times
expectations.evidence: Discusses cascade downstream of RippleTimesV1 only; does not enumerate parallel/upstream branches that remain unaffected.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Recommends cautious_delete (not super_delete or a manual drop) and routes to destructive_operations.md
expectations.evidence: Recommends plain `.delete()` and Path B uses `update1`; never names cautious_delete or links destructive_operations.md.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Flags editing a params row in place as an anti-pattern and recommends inserting a new `ripple_param_name` entry for future runs
expectations.evidence: Calls params 'immutable, content-addressed by name', advises new `*_param_name` (`..._z3`) for new values.
